intended_use: Auditable offline batch scoring and prospective randomized policy validation.
limitations: The policy has been trained and evaluated only on synthetic data.
Prospective real-world randomized validation is required before deployment.
All-positive wins without budget or capacity constraints largely because broad treatment is profitable under the configured economics.
Ranking quality matters more when treatment capacity or budget is constrained.
Economic conclusions may change with treatment cost or conversion value.
out_of_scope_use: Automated production treatment, high-stakes individual decisions, or use outside the documented population without new validation.
recommended_trial_design: Before production serving, run the all-positive randomized validation at 1x accumulated traffic with a 50% holdout.
